requirement_topic.en: Connector Redesign — GB/T 20234 versus IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口重新设计——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2及CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口重新設計——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2及CCS2

summary.en: Bosnia and Herzegovina deployments in Europe-facing public and private charging are primarily built on IEC connector ecosystems. IEC 62196 Type 2 is used for AC charging and CCS2 for DC fast charging where specified by the buyer, operator, project, or vehicle fleet. Connector selection is a technical interoperability and procurement requirement, not legal approval for the whole unit.
summary.zh: 波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那面向欧洲体系的充电场景通常以IEC接口体系为主。交流充电通常采用IEC 62196 Type 2，直流快充在买方、运营方、项目或车队指定时采用CCS2。接口选择是技术互操作和采购要求，不等同于整机单独的法定批准。
summary.zht: 波斯尼亞和黑塞哥維那面向歐洲體系的充電場景通常以IEC介面體系為主。交流充電通常採用IEC 62196 Type 2，直流快充在買方、營運方、專案或車隊指定時採用CCS2。介面選擇是技術互操作和採購要求，不等同於整機單獨的法定批准。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3:2022 CCS Combo 2 / configuration FF ecosystem
Project, fleet, operator, or procurement connector requirements

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC charging connection devices and GB/T 20234.3 for DC charging interfaces. GB/T 27930 is commonly used for charger-to-BMS communication. GB/T hardware and signalling should not be presented as Type 2 or CCS2 compliance without connector, cable, locking, pilot, communication, label, and safety re-evaluation.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB/T 20234.2作为交流充电连接装置标准、GB/T 20234.3作为直流充电接口标准，且常以GB/T 27930处理充电机与BMS通信。未经过接口、电缆、锁止、导引、通信、标签和安全复评，不应将GB/T硬件和信令直接等同于Type 2或CCS2。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB/T 20234.2作為交流充電連接裝置標準、GB/T 20234.3作為直流充電接口標準，且常以GB/T 27930處理充電機與BMS通信。未經接口、電纜、鎖止、導引、通訊、標籤和安全複評，不應將GB/T硬件和信令直接等同於Type 2或CCS2。

gap.en: GB/T-only chargers for Bosnia-facing projects need hardware and protocol conversion planning: Type 2 or CCS2 couplers, cable thermal rating, lock and proximity circuits, control-pilot behaviour, DC PLC where CCS2 is used, updated charger labels, spare-part lists, and retesting after connector redesign.
gap.zh: 仅按GB/T设计的充电桩进入波斯尼亚项目时，需要制定硬件和协议转换计划，包括Type 2或CCS2连接器、线缆热额定、锁止与接近电路、控制导引行为、使用CCS2时的直流PLC、充电桩标签更新、备件清单以及接口重设计后的复测。
gap.zht: 僅按GB/T設計的充電樁進入波斯尼亞專案時，需要制定硬件和協議轉換計劃，包括Type 2或CCS2連接器、電纜熱額定、鎖止與接近電路、控制導引行為、使用CCS2時的直流PLC、充電樁標籤更新、備件清單以及介面重設計後的複測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Bosnia project, procurement document, charging network, or fleet specifies Type 2 / CCS2 operation profile; otherwise a market-interoperability expectation rather than standalone legal approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 compliance is a China-market connector baseline and not a substitute for Type 2 or CCS2 compatibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not describe a GB/T 20234 package as Bosnia Type 2 or CCS2 ready. Prepare connector hardware, signalling, labels, and safety evidence around the specified IEC interface for the intended deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将GB/T 20234接口包描述为已适配波斯尼亚Type 2或CCS2。应按目标部署指定IEC接口重建接口硬件、信令、标签和安全证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將GB/T 20234介面包描述為已適配波斯尼亞Type 2或CCS2。應按目標部署指定IEC介面重建介面硬件、訊令、標籤和安全證據。
